commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

generation.compiledCode: var p=Object.defineProperty;var r=(t,n)=>p(t,"name",{value:n,configurable:!0});import{jsx as i,jsxs as y}from"react/jsx-runtime";const D={Sunny:"\u2600\uFE0F",Clear:"\u2600\uFE0F","Partly Cloudy":"\u26C5",Cloudy:"\u2601\uFE0F",Overcast:"\u2601\uFE0F",Rain:"\u{1F327}\uFE0F",Showers:"\u{1F326}\uFE0F",Thunderstorm:"\u26C8\uFE0F",Snow:"\u2744\uFE0F",Fog:"\u{1F32B}\uFE0F"},F={C:"\xB0C",metric:"\xB0C",F:"\xB0F",imperial:"\xB0F"},N="Humidity",T="Wind Speed",U="km/h";function I(t){const{temperature:n,condition:d,humidity:c,windSpeed:s,unit:o="metric",forecast:a=[]}=t;return useMemo(()=>{const u=o==="metric"||!o,m=u?"\xB0C":"\xB0F",C=u?"km/h":"mph",l=`${n}${m}`,f=`${s} ${C}`,h=`${c}%`;return{formattedTemp:l,formattedWind:f,formattedHumidity:h,conditionIcon:r(g=>{const e=g.toLowerCase();return e.includes("sun")||e.includes("clear")?"\u2600\uFE0F":e.includes("cloud")?"\u2601\uFE0F":e.includes("rain")||e.includes("drizzle")?"\u{1F327}\uFE0F":e.includes("snow")?"\u2744\uFE0F":e.includes("storm")||e.includes("thunder")?"\u26C8\uFE0F":"\u2601\uFE0F"},"getConditionIcon")(d),forecastItems:a,displayUnit:m}},[n,d,c,s,o,a])}r(I,"useWeather");const _=r(t=>{const{formattedTemp:n,formattedWind:d,formattedHumidity:c,conditionIcon:s,displayUnit:o}=I(t);return i(Container,{maxWidth:"md",padding:24,children:i(Card,{shadow:"md",padding:32,radius:"lg",children:y(Stack,{gap:"var(--ggui-spacing-8, 32px)",children:[i(CurrentWeather,{city:t.city,temperature:n,condition:t.condition,icon:s}),i(WeatherDetails,{humidity:c,windSpeed:d}),i(ForecastStrip,{forecast:t.forecast,unit:o})]})})})},"WeatherCard");function S(t){const n=useComponent(t);return i(ComponentUI,{...t,...n})}r(S,"Component");export{S as default};

evaluation.critique: The component has solid data handling and clear hierarchy, but suffers from inconsistent design token usage—mixing CSS variables with hardcoded values (e.g., '24px', '16px', '3rem'), and some inline styles bypass the design system. The layout is responsive but lacks polish in interactive states and some accessibility details are incomplete (e.g., wind speed unit displays unit symbol instead of proper km/h or mph).

violations: Hardcoded string "Sunny" found — should be a prop default
